message:
refactor(scheduler): organize idle detection and metrics into submodules

This commit completes the scheduler crate module reorganization by adding
dedicated submodule entry points for idle detection and system metrics.

Changes:
- Add scheduler/src/idle/mod.rs: re-exports IdleSample, IdleState, IdleTracker,
  and classify_idle from detect.rs
- Add scheduler/src/metrics/mod.rs: re-exports SystemLoad and SystemLoadSampler
  from collect.rs

The idle tracker implementation (detect.rs) and system load sampler (collect.rs)
were previously organized into dedicated modules. These mod.rs files complete
that refactoring by exposing clean public APIs for each subsystem.

This organization supports the scheduler's job selection policy:
- Idle detection tracks Active/WarmIdle/DeepIdle states using GetLastInputInfo
  on Windows, with configurable thresholds
- System metrics sample CPU/memory/disk load to inform scheduler throttling

The main lib.rs continues to re-export these types at the crate root for
backward compatibility while enabling future expansion of each subsystem
without polluting the top-level namespace.

Related: c00.4.1 (idle state machine), c00.4.2 (system load sampling)
